query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tracked_websites` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `twUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `twName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `twDomain` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `twTrackingId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `twIsActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `twCreatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `tracked_websites_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
command:

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `twUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `twName` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `twDomain` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `twTrackingId` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `twIsActive` boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  `twCreatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  CONSTRAINT `tracked_websites_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
